mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_PHONE, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, G.TEAM_NAME AS OFFICE_NM FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE AND U.USER_NO != #{user_no} AND USER_GRADE IN (6,7) ORDER BY U.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code} DESC, U.JIKWEE

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, U.USER_PHONE, U.USER_TEL, G.TEAM_NAME AS OFFICE_NM FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE
AND USER_GRADE NOT IN (0)
AND G.TEAM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTeamName}, '%')
AND U.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code}
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
AND RANK_CODE IN ('L3','L3(S)','L4','L3','임원') AND U.USER_GRADE >=1 AND USER_NO != #{user_no} ORDER BY U.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code} DESC, U.JIKWEE

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, U.USER_PHONE, U.USER_TEL, G.TEAM_NAME AS OFFICE_NM FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE
AND G.TEAM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTeamName}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
ORDER BY G.TEAM_NAME, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_NO

SELECT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_PHONE, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME AS TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE
AND G.TEAM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTeamName}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_data_processing_charge_group ( data_processing_charge_name, user_no, ok_user_no, approval_status, REGDATE, OKDATE, reason, return_reason ) values (
CONCAT("오탐_",#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{index}),
CONCAT("정탐_",#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{index}),
#{user_no}, #{ok_user_no}, #{apprType}, NOW(), NULL, #{comment}, NULL )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID

INSERT INTO pi_path_exception_charge ( path_ex_charge_name, user_no, ok_user_no, status, REGDATE, OKDATE, reason, return_reason ) values ( CONCAT("경로예외_",#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{doc_seq}), #{user_no}, #{ok_user_no}, #{apprType}, NOW(), NULL, #{comment}, NULL )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS EXCEPTION_CHARGE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT data_processing_charge_id FROM pi_data_processing_charge_group WHERE data_processing_charge_name = CONCAT(#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{doc_seq})
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_account_info SET approval_id = approval_id + 1 WHERE user_id = (#{user_no})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ((SELECT DPG.idx AS CHARGE_ID, 1 AS TYPE, DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, (SELECT T.NAME FROM pi_targets T WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.target_id AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME, DPG.user_no, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = DPG.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, DPG.data_processing_name, (SELECT processing_flag_name FROM pi_data_processing_flag WHERE processing_flag = DPG.processing_flag) AS FLAG, F.PATH, DPG.data_processing_charge_id AS CHARGE_IDX, DPG.APPROVAL_STATUS AS STATUS, DPG.REASON AS REASON, DPG.RETURN_REASON AS RETURN_REASON, CASE IFNULL(F.FID,'X') != 'X' WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FID, F.HASH_ID AS ID, IFNULL(DPG.NOTEPAD,'') AS NOTEPAD FROM PI_FIND AS F ,pi_data_processing AS DP ,pi_data_processing_group AS DPG WHERE 1=1 AND DP.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND DP.target_id = F.target_id AND DP.hash_id = F.hash_id AND DPG.idx = DP.data_processing_group_idx AND DPG.target_id = DP.target_id ORDER BY DPG.idx) UNION ALL (SELECT DPG.idx AS CHARGE_ID, 4 AS TYPE, DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, (SELECT T.NAME FROM pi_targets T WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.target_id AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME, DPG.user_no, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = DPG.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, DPG.path_ex_group_name, (SELECT path_ex_flag_name FROM pi_path_exception_flag WHERE path_ex_flag = DPG.path_ex_flag) AS FLAG, DP.PATH_EX AS PATH, DPG.path_ex_charge_id AS CHARGE_IDX, DPG.APPROVAL_STATUS AS STATUS, DPG.REASON AS REASON, DPG.RETURN_REASON AS RETURN_REASON, '' AS FID, DP.HASH_CODE AS ID, IFNULL(DPG.NOTEPAD,'') AS NOTEPAD FROM pi_path_exception AS DP ,pi_path_exception_group AS DPG WHERE 1=1 AND DPG.idx = DP.path_exception_group_idx AND DPG.target_id = DP.target_id ORDER BY DPG.idx) UNION ALL (SELECT DP.idx AS CHARGE_ID, flag+2 AS TYPE, DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, (SELECT T.NAME FROM pi_targets T WHERE T.TARGET_ID = DP.target_id AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME, DP.reg_user_no, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = DP.reg_user_no) AS USER_NAME, CASE WHEN DP.FLAG = 0 THEN '담당자 변경' WHEN DP.FLAG = 1 THEN '경로 담당자 변경' END as path_ex_group_name, '' AS FLAG, DP.path AS PATH, DP.IDX AS CHARGE_IDX, DP.APPROVAL_STATUS AS STATUS, DP.REASON AS REASON, DP.RETURN_REASON AS RETURN_REASON, DP.PATH AS FID, '' AS ID, IFNULL(DP.reason,'') AS NOTEPAD FROM pi_charge_update AS DP WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DP.idx)) D WHERE 1=1 AND (D.CHARGE_IDX,TYPE) IN
(#{item.idx}, #{item.type})
ORDER BY D.TYPE, D.CHARGE_ID DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE PI_DATA_PROCESSING SET APPROVAL_STATUS = #{apprType}, OKDATE = NOW(), OKUSER_NO = #{user_no} WHERE data_processing_group_idx = #{group_id};
UPDATE pi_find F, (SELECT D.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX AS IDX, D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.HASH_ID FROM pi_data_processing D WHERE D.data_processing_group_idx = #{group_id}) D SET F.APPROVAL_ID = D.IDX, F.APPROVAL_FLAG = 0 WHERE F.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = D.AP_NO AND F.HASH_ID = D.HASH_ID;
mapper.select: SELECT IDX, POLICY_NAME, POLICY_VERSION, REGDATE, COMMENT, DATATYPE_ID, SCHEDULE_LABEL, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, SCHEDULE_CPU, SCHEDULE_DATA, SCHEDULE_MEMORY, SCHEDULE_TRACE, DMZ, MANAGE, DEVELOP, DEFAULT_CHECK FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY WHERE 1=1 AND default_check = 1

SELECT DPG.IDX, DPG.TARGET_ID, L.LOCATION_ID, F.PATH FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP AS DPG ,PI_DATA_PROCESSING AS DP ,PI_FIND F ,PI_TARGETS T ,PI_LOCATIONS L WHERE 1=1 AND DP.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX = DPG.IDX AND F.GROUP_ID = DP.GROUP_ID AND F.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND F.HASH_ID = DP.HASH_ID AND T.TARGET_ID = DPG.TARGET_ID AND T.GROUP_ID = L.GROUP_ID AND T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND L.DESCRIPTION = 'All local files' AND DPG.IDX IN
#{group_list}

delete.if: DELETE DPG, DP FROM pi_data_processing_group AS DPG JOIN pi_data_processing AS DP ON DPG.idx = DP.data_processing_group_idx WHERE DPG.idx = #{idx}
DELETE DPG, DP FROM pi_path_exception_group AS DPG JOIN pi_path_exception AS DP ON DPG.idx = DP.path_exception_group_idx WHERE DPG.idx = #{idx}

mapper.select: SELECT DPS.ID AS ID, LPAD(IFNULL(DPS.ID,0)+1, 10,0) AS ID_LENGTH, DPS.USER_NO AS USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USER_NO = #{user_no}) AS USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DPS.REGDATE, '%Y%m%d') AS REGDATE FROM pi_data_processing_seq DPS WHERE DPS.REGDATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') UNION ALL SELECT 0, LPAD(1, 10,0) AS ID_LENGTH, '', (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USER_NO = #{user_no}) AS USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_DATA_PROCESSING_SEQ (ID, USER_NO, REGDATE) VALUES (#{index}, #{user_no}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'))
mapper.select: SELECT IDX, APPROVAL_FLAG FROM PI_APPROVAL_FLAG WHERE ENABLE = 1;

select.if: SELECT 1 AS type, IFNULL(DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID,0) AS idx FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND APPROVAL_STATUS = 'W'
SELECT 4 AS type, IFNULL(PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID,0) AS idx FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND APPROVAL_STATUS = 'W'

mapper.select: SELECT IDX, TARGET_ID, AP_NO, HASH_ID, PATH, FLAG, UPDATE_OWNER, REG_USER_NO, OK_USER_NO FROM PI_CHARGE_UPDATE WHERE IDX = #{idx}
mapper.update:
UPDATE pi_find F, (SELECT F.HASH_ID, F.PATH, F.OWNER, F.TARGET_ID, F.AP_NO, DP.APPROVAL_STATUS, DP.OKDATE FROM pi_find F LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_data_processing DP ON F.HASH_ID = DP.HASH_ID AND F.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO AND DP.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX = (SELECT MAX(DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM pi_data_processing WHERE DP.HASH_ID = HASH_ID AND DP.TARGET_ID = TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = AP_NO) LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_charge_update CU ON F.TARGET_ID = CU.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = CU.AP_NO AND F.HASH_ID = CU.HASH_ID AND CU.FLAG = 1 AND CU.REG_USER_NO = F.OWNER AND CU.IDX = (SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM pi_charge_update WHERE CU.HASH_ID = HASH_ID AND CU.TARGET_ID = TARGET_ID AND CU.AP_NO = AP_NO) WHERE 1 = 1 AND F.PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',#{PATH},'%') AND F.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND F.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} AND (DP.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'D' OR DP.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL) AND (CU.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'D' OR CU.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL) AND OWNER = #{REG_USER_NO}) D SET F.APPROVAL_ID = #{IDX}, F.APPROVAL_FLAG = 1
WHERE F.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND F.HASH_ID = D.HASH_ID AND F.AP_NO = D.AP_NO;

UPDATE pi_find F, (SELECT F.HASH_ID, F.PATH, F.OWNER, F.TARGET_ID, F.AP_NO, DP.APPROVAL_STATUS, DP.OKDATE FROM pi_find F LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_data_processing DP ON F.HASH_ID = DP.HASH_ID AND F.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO AND DP.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX = (SELECT MAX(DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM pi_data_processing WHERE DP.HASH_ID = HASH_ID AND DP.TARGET_ID = TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = AP_NO) LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_charge_update CU ON F.TARGET_ID = CU.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = CU.AP_NO AND F.HASH_ID = CU.HASH_ID AND CU.FLAG = 1 AND CU.REG_USER_NO = F.OWNER AND CU.IDX = (SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM pi_charge_update WHERE CU.HASH_ID = HASH_ID AND CU.TARGET_ID = TARGET_ID AND CU.AP_NO = AP_NO) WHERE 1 = 1 AND F.PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',#{PATH},'%') AND F.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND F.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} AND (DP.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'D' OR DP.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL) AND (CU.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'D' OR CU.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL) AND OWNER = #{REG_USER_NO}) D SET F.OWNER = #{UPDATE_OWNER} WHERE F.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND F.HASH_ID = D.HASH_ID AND F.AP_NO = D.AP_NO;
mapper.select: SELECT PATH_EX AS PATH, PATH_EX_ID AS IDX, TARGET_ID, AP_NO, USER_NO AS REG_USER_NO, CONCAT('ex_',USER_NO) AS UPDATE_OWNER FROM pi_path_exception WHERE path_exception_group_idx = #{group_id};

SELECT DATA_PROCESSING_IDX AS IDX, DP.HASH_ID, DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, (SELECT T.name FROM pi_targets T WHERE DP.target_id= T.TARGET_ID AND DP.ap_no = T.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME, USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE DP.USER_NO = U.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, F.path AS PATH_EX, L.LOCATION_ID, L.DESCRIPTION FROM pi_find F, pi_data_processing_flag DF, pi_locations L,PI_DATA_PROCESSING DP LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGETS T ON T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO WHERE DP.hash_id = F.hash_id AND DP.TARGET_ID = F.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND DP.PROCESSING_FLAG = DF.PROCESSING_FLAG AND DF.type = 0 AND data_processing_group_idx = #{group_id} AND L.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO AND L.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND L.description = 'All local files'

SELECT DATA_PROCESSING_IDX AS IDX, DP.HASH_ID, DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, (SELECT T.name FROM pi_targets T WHERE DP.target_id= T.TARGET_ID AND DP.ap_no = T.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME, USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE DP.USER_NO = U.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, F.path AS PATH_EX, L.LOCATION_ID, L.DESCRIPTION FROM pi_find F, pi_data_processing_flag DF ,PI_DATA_PROCESSING DP LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGETS T ON T.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_LOCATIONS L ON L.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO AND L.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND (T.TYPE= 1 OR (T.TYPE = 0 AND L.description = 'All local files' )) WHERE DP.hash_id = F.hash_id AND DP.TARGET_ID = F.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND DP.PROCESSING_FLAG = DF.PROCESSING_FLAG AND DF.type = 0 AND data_processing_group_idx = #{group_id}

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT F.HASH_ID AS ID, F.HASH_ID AS PID, F.FID AS FID, F.TARGET_ID, F.AP_NO, F.PATH, F.REMEDIATION_STATUS, F.DELDATE, 0 AS FLAG FROM pi_find F WHERE F.HASH_ID = #{HASH_ID} AND F.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND F.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} #AND F.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT S.NODE_ID AS ID, S.PARENT_ID AS PID, S.INFO_ID AS FID, S.TARGET_ID, S.AP_NO, S.PATH, S.REMEDIATION_STATUS, S.DELDATE, 1 AS FLAG FROM PI_SUBPATH AS S, CTE WHERE CTE.ID = S.PARENT_ID AND CTE.TARGET_ID = S.TARGET_ID AND S.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND CTE.AP_NO = S.AP_NO AND S.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} #AND S.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL ) SELECT *,(SELECT NAME FROM PI_TARGETS WHERE TARGET_ID = CTE.TARGET_ID AND AP_NO = CTE.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME ,IFNULL(CONCAT('[',GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT('\"',SM.DATA_TYPE, '\"')),']'),'') AS DATA_TYPES FROM CTE LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_summary SM ON CTE.PID = SM.OBJECT_ID AND SM.DELDATE IS NULL WHERE 1 = 1 #AND CTE.ID = OR CTE.FID IS NOT NULL; #AND CTE.FID IS NOT NULL AND CTE.DELDATE IS NULL AND CTE.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL GROUP BY CTE.ID

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT F.HASH_ID AS ID, F.HASH_ID AS PID, F.FID AS FID, F.TARGET_ID, F.AP_NO, F.PATH, F.REMEDIATION_STATUS, F.DELDATE, 0 AS FLAG FROM pi_find F WHERE F.HASH_ID = #{HASH_ID} AND F.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND F.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} #AND F.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT S.NODE_ID AS ID, S.PARENT_ID AS PID, S.INFO_ID AS FID, S.TARGET_ID, S.AP_NO, S.PATH, S.REMEDIATION_STATUS, S.DELDATE, 1 AS FLAG FROM PI_SUBPATH AS S, CTE WHERE CTE.ID = S.PARENT_ID AND CTE.TARGET_ID = S.TARGET_ID AND S.TARGET_ID = #{TARGET_ID} AND CTE.AP_NO = S.AP_NO AND S.AP_NO = #{AP_NO} #AND S.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL ) SELECT *,(SELECT NAME FROM PI_TARGETS WHERE TARGET_ID = CTE.TARGET_ID AND AP_NO = CTE.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME ,IFNULL(CONCAT('[',GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT('\"',SM.DATA_TYPE, '\"')),']'),'') AS DATA_TYPES FROM CTE LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_summary SM ON CTE.PID = SM.OBJECT_ID AND SM.DELDATE IS NULL WHERE 1 = 1 #AND CTE.ID = OR CTE.FID IS NOT NULL; #AND CTE.FID IS NOT NULL AND CTE.DELDATE IS NULL #AND CTE.REMEDIATION_STATUS IS NULL GROUP BY CTE.ID

select.if: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT, IF (COUNT(*)>1, CONCAT(D.HOST_NAME,' 외 ',COUNT(*)-1,'개'),D.HOST_NAME) AS HOST_COUNT, D.USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = D.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, D.OKUSER_NO AS OK_USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = D.OKUSER_NO) AS OK_USER_NAME FROM (SELECT DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO, DP.USER_NO, DP.okuser_no, (SELECT NAME FROM pi_targets T WHERE T.target_id = DP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = DP.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME FROM pi_data_processing_group DPG,pi_data_processing DP WHERE data_processing_charge_id = #{processing_charge_id} AND DP.data_processing_group_idx =DPG.IDX GROUP BY DP.TARGET_ID, DP.AP_NO) D GROUP BY D.USER_NO

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT, IF (COUNT(*)>1, CONCAT(D.HOST_NAME,' 외 ',COUNT(*)-1,'개'),D.HOST_NAME) AS HOST_COUNT, D.USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = D.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, D.OK_USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = D.OK_USER_NO) AS OK_USER_NAME FROM (SELECT PE.TARGET_ID, PE.AP_NO,PE.USER_NO, PE.ok_user_no, (SELECT NAME FROM pi_targets T WHERE T.target_id = PE.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = PE.AP_NO) AS HOST_NAME FROM pi_path_exception_group PEG,pi_path_exception PE WHERE PEG.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID = #{exception_charge_id} AND PE.path_exception_group_idx = PEG.IDX GROUP BY PE.TARGET_ID, PE.AP_NO) D GROUP BY D.USER_NO

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ((SELECT 1 AS TYPE, DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID AS IDX, DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_NAME AS APPROVAL_NAME FROM pi_data_processing_charge_group) UNION ALL (SELECT 4 AS TYPE, IDX AS IDX, PATH_EX_CHARGE_NAME AS APPROVAL_NAME FROM pi_path_exception_charge))D WHERE 1=1 AND D.TYPE = #{APPROVAL_TYPE} AND D.IDX = #{APPROVAL_IDX}
